business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy premium shown: 403697.14. Deductible: 50000. Coinsurance shown: 90.
Endorsement CP 04 05 (10 12), effective 2026-03-15. Provides Coverage A for loss to the undamaged portion of the building due to enforcement of ordinance or law requiring demolition.

Endorsement CP 04 09 (10 12), effective 2026-03-15. Covers direct physical loss of or damage to Covered Property caused by Equipment Breakdown accident to mechanical, electrical, or pressure equipment.

Endorsement CP 04 17 (10 12), effective 2026-03-15. Covers direct physical loss of or damage to Covered Property caused by interruption of water supply, communication supply, and power supply services.

positives: Policy includes Building, Contents, and Business Income limits.
Attached endorsements include Ordinance Or Law Coverage, Equipment Breakdown Coverage, and Utility Services — Direct Damage.
concerns: Vacancy condition applies: if a building has been vacant for more than 60 consecutive days before loss, certain causes of loss are excluded and other covered losses may be reduced by 15%.
Coinsurance condition applies if the required insurance amount is not maintained.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: SIC Code: 6512 Description: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas
